description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black pole supporting two lantern-style light fixtures suspended from short, outward-curving arms. The lanterns have a hexagonal shape with frosted glass panels and a dark metallic frame, evoking a traditional or vintage aesthetic. The top of the post is capped with a decorative finial, adding a subtle ornamental touch. The lanterns are symmetrically positioned on either side of the central post, each hanging from a small hook. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or residential streets. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the post and lantern frames, with glass for the light enclosures.
description: A tall black lamppost with two hexagonal lanterns hanging from curved arms, featuring frosted glass panels and a decorative finial on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lanterns symmetrically hanging from the arms, with the finial and pole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the two lanterns, one behind the other, and the slender profile of the post.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both lanterns visible and the finial centered above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the lanterns in a line and the post's thin silhouette.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Hexagonal lantern with frosted glass panels and dark metallic frame, traditional vintage style.
